The '''J930 ''Dash-8'' engine''' was a [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]] [[Podracer engine/Legends|engine]] produced by [[JAK Racing]] prior to the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. The [[Triffian/Legends|Triffian]] [[Podracer (profession)/Legends|Podracer]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Ebe E. Endocott/Legends|Ebe E. Endocott]] utilized [[Color/Legends|blue]] J930 ''Dash-8'' engines in the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] won by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] during the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. Later during [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], the [[Devlikk/Legends|Devlikk]] competitor [[Raido]] used the engines during the [[Mon Gazza Maze/Legends|Mon Gazza Maze]] event on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Mon Gazza/Legends|Mon Gazza]]. His Podracer was destroyed, however, when he rammed another competitor from behind.

==Characteristics==
The J930 Dash-8 was a solid model of podracer. Great traction and turning, balanced acceleration and top speed, with a nice cooling and repair mechanism. While the brakes were not so good and the pod itself was still on the slow side, [[Ebe E. Endocott/Legends|Ebe E. Endocott]] was skilled enough with it to to win three consecutive championships on [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]], place 4th in the [[Boonta Eve Classic (32 BBY)/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] of [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] and was the crowd favorite at the popular [[Fire Mountain Rally/Legends|Fire Mountain Rally]] race course on [[Baroonda/Legends|Baroonda]].
